mapper.select: SELECT id, version_no AS versionNo, map_status AS mapStatus, map_width AS mapWidth, map_height AS mapHeight, background_url AS backgroundUrl, published_at AS publishedAt FROM seat_maps WHERE study_room_id = #{roomId} AND map_status = 'published' ORDER BY version_no DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT s.id, s.seat_code AS seatCode, s.display_label AS displayLabel, s.seat_type AS seatType, s.row_no AS rowNo, s.col_no AS colNo, s.has_power AS hasPower, s.is_window_side AS isWindowSide, s.is_accessible AS isAccessible, s.seat_status AS seatStatus, s.is_bookable AS isBookable, s.map_x AS mapX, s.map_y AS mapY, s.map_width AS mapWidth, s.map_height AS mapHeight, s.map_rotation AS mapRotation FROM seats s JOIN seat_maps sm ON sm.study_room_id = s.study_room_id WHERE sm.id = #{mapId} AND s.deleted_at IS NULL ORDER BY s.row_no, s.col_no
